classification_rationale: Attacker exploits a validation-gap in ControllerV4.swapExactJarForJar() which fails to verify that the input Jar contracts are legitimate protocol Jars. An Evil Jar contract is passed as both _fromJar and _toJar, triggering a delegatecall into CurveProxyLogic that drains cDAI from the Controller. Basic withdraw/swap actions follow after the initial validation-gap is triggered.
